mapper.sql: id, singer_id, name, introduction, create_time, update_time, pic
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.singer_id, s.name, s.introduction, s.create_time, s.update_time, s.pic, s.url, s.play_count FROM song s ORDER BY s.play_count DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT s.id, s.singer_id, s.name, s.introduction, s.create_time, s.update_time, s.pic, s.url, s.play_count FROM song s ORDER BY s.play_count DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT s.id, s.singer_id, s.name, s.introduction, s.create_time, s.update_time, s.pic, s.url, s.play_count FROM song s ORDER BY s.play_count DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE song SET play_count = play_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE song SET play_count = #{playCount} WHERE id = #{songId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.singer_id,s.name,s.introduction,s.create_time,s.update_time,s.pic, s.url,s.lyric,s.play_count,si.name AS singer_name from song s INNER JOIN list_song ls on s.id = ls.song_id LEFT JOIN singer si on s.singer_id = si.id where ls.song_list_id = #{songListId}
